name: Caesar Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a screw-top jar, mix together the lemon juice, vinegar, water, parmesan cheese, dijon mustard, garlic powder, and black pepper.
2. Cover the jar tightly with its lid.
3. Shake well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
4. Before each serving, give the dressing another good shake to ensure everything is evenly mixed.
